name: Spring The Worker / ENAsona
description:
"What a wonderful day! What wonderful people! I never thought I'd find myself in such a setting, with my best friend!"

"This is so... so..! —"

"DISGUSTING!"

My Enasona. They were created back when BBQ came out. And it was fun to do a cross between FNaF and Ena. Bep
